account_recovery_setting.description: Settings that define how account recovery can be performed, such as through email or phone.

admin_create_user_config.description: Configuration for creating users by an admin, including settings for invite messages and account validity.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Cognito User Pool.

auto_verified_attributes.description: Attributes that are automatically verified, such as email or phone number.

creation_date.description: The date when the user pool was created.

custom_domain.description: The custom domain associated with the user pool.

deletion_protection.description: Specifies whether deletion protection is enabled for the user pool.

device_configuration.description: Configuration related to remembering devices and requiring challenges for new devices.

domain.description: The domain associated with the user pool.

email_configuration.description: Settings for sending emails from the user pool, such as the source email address and configuration set.

estimated_number_of_users.description: An estimate of the number of users in the user pool.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user pool.

lambda_config.description: Lambda functions configuration for various user pool triggers, like custom message sending and user migration.

last_modified_date.description: The date when the user pool was last modified.

mfa_configuration.description: The multi-factor authentication (MFA) configuration for the user pool.

name.description: The name of the user pool.

schema_attributes.description: Schema attributes for the user pool, defining data types, mutability, and constraints for user attributes.

sms_authentication_message.description: The SMS message template for authentication.

sms_verification_message.description: The SMS message template used for verification purposes.

tags.description: Tags associated with the user pool for organizational purposes.

user_pool_tags.description: Tags specifically applied to the user pool.

username_attributes.description: Attributes that can be used as a username, such as email or phone number.
